title: /keys timestamps fall back to 1970 wall-clock
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_keys.c:371-375,573-627. spec/11-lci.md §17.5.5 shows first_seen/last_seen as wall-clock ISO8601 ('2026-05-26T12:00:00Z'). get_unix_time() falls back to k_uptime_get()/1000, so a node without wall clock reports January 1970 dates. Contrast: /status correctly omits unix_time when invalid per §17.5.3. Fix: omit the fields or use uptime-relative encoding when wall_clock_valid is false.
